hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE '^(python3?|pip) ' && jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qv '.venv/bin/' && jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qv 'source .venv/bin/activate' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Python commands must run inside the .venv. Prefix with: source .venv/bin/activate &&"}' || true
